name: Countries with flattest cost curves
description: Flattest: FI (+23.1%), FR (+26.0%)

name: Ireland excess decomposition
description: Labour: €175, Materials: €53, Regulatory: €138

name: Interaction: subperiod x bilateral (IE vs NL pre-COVID vs COVID)
description: IE grew slower than NL pre-COVID but similar during COVID; NL diverged mainly 2022-2023 (+22.5%)

description: BE+IE+SE cluster averaged +10.8% in Ukraine period vs fast cluster (DE+NL+AT) +17.8%

name: Interaction: absolute level x growth rate
description: Weak negative correlation between 2025 EUR/sqm and cumulative growth; base-year effect not dominant

name: Interaction: modular adoption x shock sensitivity
